name: Evangeline Babineaux
subtitle: chief engineer at WGUR · the tower's steward

ultimate_ability.label: The Kill Switch
ultimate_ability.description: Once per game. Cut the carrier on a signal you cannot stop by ordinary means: end the current visitor's contest immediately, resolve it as neutral. The tower falls. What was in the tower rests on the ground.

notes: Evangeline's hand for the Tower arcana. CARRIER OVERLOAD is the second stat (renamed AFTERSHAKES / INSPECTION PRESSURE per scenario). Scenarios: render_queue (canonical hard), pre_dawn_quiet (decompression easier), the_clear_morning (inspection hardest).
